tracks.name: brutal
tracks.meaning: The frustrating, chaotic reality of teenage anxiety and expectations.

tracks.meaning: Exhaustion from constantly trying to mold yourself for someone's approval.

tracks.meaning: Selfishly hoping an ex stays happy, but never quite as happy as they were with you.

tracks.meaning: How love can manipulate reason into believing impossible lies.

tracks.name: get him back!
tracks.meaning: The double meaning of wanting revenge vs. wanting an ex back.

tracks.name: love is embarrassing

tracks.meaning: The painful difficulty of forgiving someone who deeply hurt you.

tracks.name: pretty isn't pretty
tracks.meaning: Body dysmorphia and the relentless pressure of beauty standards.

tracks.name: teenage dream
tracks.meaning: Fears of peaking early and growing up.

album: you seem pretty sad for a girl so in love

tracks.meaning: Self-deprecating reflection on overthinking and mental paralysis.

tracks.meaning: Mourning the fading blend of red (anger) and blue (sadness) into acceptance.

tracks.meaning: The humility and pain of pleading for someone to stay.
